hotkey.title: Global Hotkey
hotkey.description: Press Ctrl+Space anywhere to summon Volt instantly. You can change this shortcut in Settings > Hotkeys.

indexing.title: File Indexing
indexing.description: Volt indexes your files for instant search. Configure which folders to index in Settings > Indexing.

plugins.title: Built-in Plugins
plugins.description: Calculator, emoji picker, web search, timer, system monitor and more — just start typing to use them.
